sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72491" key="oi)no/garon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνό-γᾰρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen><sense id="n72491.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"><cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, γάρον</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed with wine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.85</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
